---
title: "Stepwise Cox models"
author: "Puck Quarles van Ufford"
date: today
format: html
---

# Set up

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| message: false
#| echo: true

library("tidyverse")
library("survival")
library("caret")
```

```{r}
#| label: seed
#| echo: true

set.seed(8)
```

# Load data

```{r}
#| label: load_data
#| message: false
#| echo: true

data_os <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os.tsv")
data_os_noNLP <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os_noNLP.tsv")
data_os_nogenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os_nogenomic.tsv")
data_os_noNLPgenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os_noNLPgenomic.tsv")

data_dfs <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs.tsv")
data_dfs_noNLP <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs_noNLP.tsv")
data_dfs_nogenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs_nogenomic.tsv")
data_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs_noNLPgenomic.tsv")
```

# Settings

```{r}
#| label: settings
#| echo: true

max_iterations <- 10
```

# Set up cross-validation

```{r}
#| label: 5_fold_CV
#| echo: true

folds_os <- createFolds(data_os$os_status,
                        k = 5,
                        list = TRUE,
                        returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_os_noNLP <- createFolds(data_os_noNLP$os_status,
                              k = 5,
                              list = TRUE,
                              returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_os_nogenomic <- createFolds(data_os_nogenomic$os_status,
                                  k = 5,
                                  list = TRUE,
                                  returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_os_noNLPgenomic <- createFolds(data_os_noNLPgenomic$os_status,
                                     k = 5,
                                     list = TRUE,
                                     returnTrain = FALSE)

folds_dfs <- createFolds(data_dfs$dfs_status,
                         k = 5,
                         list = TRUE,
                         returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_dfs_noNLP <- createFolds(data_dfs_noNLP$dfs_status,
                               k = 5,
                               list = TRUE,
                               returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_dfs_nogenomic <- createFolds(data_dfs_nogenomic$dfs_status,
                                   k = 5,
                                   list = TRUE,
                                   returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- createFolds(data_dfs_noNLPgenomic$dfs_status,
                                      k = 5,
                                      list = TRUE,
                                      returnTrain = FALSE)
```

# Forward stepwise Cox model workflow

```{r}
#| label: forward_stepwise_Cox_function
#| echo: true

forward_cox_cv <- function(data, 
                           time_var,
                           status_var, 
                           folds, 
                           max_iter = max_iterations) {

  outcome_cols <- c(time_var, 
                    status_var)
  
  all_features <- setdiff(colnames(data),
                          c(outcome_cols, 
                            "patient_id", 
                            "sample_id"))

  results <- list()

  for (k in seq_along(folds)) {

    test_idx  <- folds[[k]]
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)),
                         test_idx)

    data_train <- data[train_idx, ]
    data_test  <- data[test_idx, ]

    features_to_test <- all_features
    added_features <- character()

    max_iter_k <- min(length(all_features), 
                      max_iter)

    for (iter in seq_len(max_iter_k)) {

      c_indices <- tibble(feature = character(),
                          c_index = numeric())

      for (f in features_to_test) {

        formula <- as.formula(paste0(
          "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var,  ") ~ ",
          paste(c(added_features,
                  f), 
                collapse = " + ")))

        model <- coxph(formula, 
                       data = data_train)

        c_index <- summary(model)$concordance[1]

        c_indices <- add_row(c_indices,
                             feature = f,
                             c_index = c_index)
      }

      best_feature <- c_indices$feature[which.max(c_indices$c_index)]
      
      formula <- as.formula(paste0(
        "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var,  ") ~ ",
        paste(c(added_features,
                best_feature), 
              collapse = " + ")))
      
      model <- coxph(formula,
                     data = data_train)
      
      prediction <- predict(model,
                            newdata = data_test, 
                            type = "lp")
      
      c_index <- survConcordance(as.formula(paste0(
        "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ prediction")),
        data = data_test)$concordance

      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- tibble(
        fold = k,
        iteration = iter,
        added_feature = best_feature,
        c_index = c_index)

      added_features <- c(added_features, 
                          best_feature)
      
      features_to_test <- setdiff(features_to_test, 
                                  best_feature)
    }
  }

  bind_rows(results)
}
```

# Predicting OS

## All features

```{r}
#| label: predict_os
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_os <- forward_cox_cv(data = data_os,
                         time_var = "years_to_os_event",
                         status_var = "os_status",
                         folds = folds_os)

write_tsv(x = res_os,
         file = paste0("../results/06_res_per_fold_OS_",
                       as.character(max_iterations),
                       "_max.tsv"))

summary_os <- res_os |> 
  group_by(iteration) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop")

summary_os |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = iteration, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of features included",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Forward stepwise Cox model (OS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: all"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/06_C_index_plot_OS_",
              as.character(max_iterations),
              "_max.png"))

best_model_os <- summary_os |> 
  filter(mean_c_index == max(mean_c_index)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Forward_stepwise_Cox",
         features = "all",
         outcome = "OS") |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, iteration))

write_tsv(best_model_os,
          file = paste0("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"),
          append = TRUE)
```

## No NLP data

```{r}
#| label: predict_os_noNLP
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_os_noNLP <- forward_cox_cv(data = data_os_noNLP,
                               time_var = "years_to_os_event",
                               status_var = "os_status",
                               folds = folds_os_noNLP)

write_tsv(x = res_os_noNLP,
          file = paste0("../results/06_res_per_fold_OS_noNLP_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"))

summary_os_noNLP <- res_os_noNLP |> 
  group_by(iteration) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop")

summary_os_noNLP |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = iteration, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of features included",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Forward stepwise Cox model (OS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no NLP"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/06_C_index_plot_OS_noNLP_",
              as.character(max_iterations),
              "_max.png"))

best_model_os_noNLP <- summary_os_noNLP |> 
  filter(mean_c_index == max(mean_c_index)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Forward_stepwise_Cox",
         features = "noNLP",
         outcome = "OS") |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, iteration))

write_tsv(best_model_os_noNLP,
          file = paste0("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"),
          append = TRUE)
```

## No genomic data

```{r}
#| label: predict_os_nogenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_os_nogenomic <- forward_cox_cv(data = data_os_nogenomic,
                                   time_var = "years_to_os_event",
                                   status_var = "os_status",
                                   folds = folds_os_nogenomic)

write_tsv(x = res_os_nogenomic,
          file = paste0("../results/06_res_per_fold_OS_nogenomic_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"))

summary_os_nogenomic <- res_os_nogenomic |> 
  group_by(iteration) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop")

summary_os_nogenomic |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = iteration, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of features included",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Forward stepwise Cox model (OS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no genomic"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/06_C_index_plot_OS_nogenomic_",
              as.character(max_iterations),
              "_max.png"))

best_model_os_nogenomic <- summary_os_nogenomic |> 
  filter(mean_c_index == max(mean_c_index)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Forward_stepwise_Cox",
         features = "nogenomic",
         outcome = "OS") |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, iteration))

write_tsv(best_model_os_nogenomic,
          file = paste0("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"),
          append = TRUE)
```

## Only routine data

```{r}
#| label: predict_os_noNLPgenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_os_noNLPgenomic <- forward_cox_cv(data = data_os_noNLPgenomic,
                                      time_var = "years_to_os_event",
                                      status_var = "os_status",
                                      folds = folds_os_noNLPgenomic)

write_tsv(x = res_os_noNLPgenomic,
          file = paste0("../results/06_res_per_fold_OS_noNLPgenomic_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"))

summary_os_noNLPgenomic <- res_os_noNLPgenomic |> 
  group_by(iteration) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop")

summary_os_noNLPgenomic |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = iteration, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of features included",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Forward stepwise Cox model (OS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no NLP or genomic"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/06_C_index_plot_OS_noNLPgenomic_",
              as.character(max_iterations),
              "_max.png"))

best_model_os_noNLPgenomic <- summary_os_noNLPgenomic |> 
  filter(mean_c_index == max(mean_c_index)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Forward_stepwise_Cox",
         features = "noNLPgenomic",
         outcome = "OS") |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, iteration))

write_tsv(best_model_os_noNLPgenomic,
          file = paste0("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"),
          append = TRUE)
```

# Predicting DFS

## All features

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_dfs <- forward_cox_cv(data = data_dfs,
                          time_var = "years_to_dfs_event",
                          status_var = "dfs_status",
                          folds = folds_dfs)

write_tsv(x = res_dfs,
          file = paste0("../results/06_res_per_fold_DFS_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"))

summary_dfs <- res_dfs |> 
  group_by(iteration) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop")

summary_dfs |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = iteration, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of features included",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Forward stepwise Cox model (DFS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: all"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/06_C_index_plot_DFS_",
              as.character(max_iterations),
              "_max.png"))

best_model_dfs <- summary_dfs |> 
  filter(mean_c_index == max(mean_c_index)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Forward_stepwise_Cox",
         features = "all",
         outcome = "DFS") |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, iteration))

write_tsv(best_model_dfs,
          file = paste0("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"),
          append = TRUE)
```

## No NLP data

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs_noNLP
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_dfs_noNLP <- forward_cox_cv(data = data_dfs_noNLP,
                                time_var = "years_to_dfs_event",
                                status_var = "dfs_status",
                                folds = folds_dfs_noNLP)

write_tsv(x = res_dfs_noNLP,
          file = paste0("../results/06_res_per_fold_DFS_noNLP_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"))

summary_dfs_noNLP <- res_dfs_noNLP |> 
  group_by(iteration) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop")

summary_dfs_noNLP |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = iteration, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of features included",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Forward stepwise Cox model (DFS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no NLP"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/06_C_index_plot_DFS_noNLP_",
              as.character(max_iterations),
              "_max.png"))

best_model_dfs_noNLP <- summary_dfs_noNLP |> 
  filter(mean_c_index == max(mean_c_index)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Forward_stepwise_Cox",
         features = "noNLP",
         outcome = "DFS") |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, iteration))

write_tsv(best_model_dfs_noNLP,
          file = paste0("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"),
          append = TRUE)
```

## No genomic data

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs_nogenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_dfs_nogenomic <- forward_cox_cv(data = data_dfs_nogenomic,
                                    time_var = "years_to_dfs_event",
                                    status_var = "dfs_status",
                                    folds = folds_dfs_nogenomic)

write_tsv(x = res_dfs_nogenomic,
          file = paste0("../results/06_res_per_fold_DFS_nogenomic_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"))

summary_dfs_nogenomic <- res_dfs_nogenomic |> 
  group_by(iteration) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop")

summary_dfs_nogenomic |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = iteration, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of features included",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Forward stepwise Cox model (DFS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no genomic"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/06_C_index_plot_DFS_nogenomic_",
              as.character(max_iterations),
              "_max.png"))

best_model_dfs_nogenomic <- summary_dfs_nogenomic |> 
  filter(mean_c_index == max(mean_c_index)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Forward_stepwise_Cox",
         features = "nogenomic",
         outcome = "DFS") |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, iteration))

write_tsv(best_model_dfs_nogenomic,
          file = paste0("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"),
          append = TRUE)
```

## Only routine data

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs_noNLPgenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- forward_cox_cv(data = data_dfs_noNLPgenomic,
                                       time_var = "years_to_dfs_event",
                                       status_var = "dfs_status",
                                       folds = folds_dfs_noNLPgenomic)

write_tsv(x = res_dfs_noNLPgenomic,
          file = paste0("../results/06_res_per_fold_DFS_noNLPgenomic_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"))

summary_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- res_dfs_noNLPgenomic |> 
  group_by(iteration) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop")

summary_dfs_noNLPgenomic |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = iteration, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of features included",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Forward stepwise Cox model (DFS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no NLP or genomic"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/06_C_index_plot_DFS_noNLPgenomic_",
              as.character(max_iterations),
              "_max.png"))

best_model_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- summary_dfs_noNLPgenomic |> 
  filter(mean_c_index == max(mean_c_index)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Forward_stepwise_Cox",
         features = "noNLPgenomic",
         outcome = "DFS") |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, iteration))

write_tsv(best_model_dfs_noNLPgenomic,
          file = paste0("../results/06_stepwise_cox_models_results_",
                        as.character(max_iterations),
                        "_max.tsv"),
          append = TRUE)
```
